docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $923.00 FILED BY KANBERG, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE (RE: PAYMENT MADE TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT ON NOV-18-20) FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
